scripts.build:register-pt: npx mjml register/register-pt.mjml -o register/register-pt.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath . --config.minify true
scripts.build:register-en: npx mjml register/register-en.mjml -o register/register-en.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath . --config.minify true
scripts.build:register-reply-pt: npx mjml register/register-reply-pt.mjml -o register/register-reply-pt.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath . --config.minify true
scripts.build:register-reply-en: npx mjml register/register-reply-en.mjml -o register/register-reply-en.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath . --config.minify true
scripts.build:contact-pt: npx mjml contact/contact-pt.mjml -o contact/contact-pt.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath . --config.minify true
scripts.build:contact-en: npx mjml contact/contact-en.mjml -o contact/contact-en.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath . --config.minify true
scripts.build:package-pt: npx mjml package/package-pt.mjml -o package/package-pt.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath . --config.minify true
scripts.build:package-en: npx mjml package/package-en.mjml -o package/package-en.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath . --config.minify true
scripts.build:service-pt: npx mjml service/service-pt.mjml -o service/service-pt.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath . --config.minify true
scripts.build:service-en: npx mjml service/service-en.mjml -o service/service-en.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath . --config.minify true
scripts.build:voucher-pt: npx mjml voucher/voucher-pt.mjml -o voucher/voucher-pt.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath . --config.minify true
scripts.build:voucher-en: npx mjml voucher/voucher-en.mjml -o voucher/voucher-en.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath . --config.minify true
scripts.build: npm run build:register-pt && npm run build:register-en && npm run build:register-reply-pt && npm run build:register-reply-en && npm run build:contact-pt && npm run build:contact-en && npm run build:package-pt && npm run build:package-en && npm run build:service-pt && npm run build:service-en && npm run build:voucher-pt && npm run build:voucher-en
